items.title: Mastercard denies pressuring game platforms, Valve tells a different story
items.description: Mastercard seemingly denied playing a role in a recent marketplace crackdown on games with adult content, while Valve says the pressure was indirect.

items.title: Consumer Tech News (July 28–August 1): Earnings From Apple, Microsoft, and Amazon Offset by Fed Jitters, Tariff Woes
items.description: Big Tech's strong earnings clashed with economic headwinds, inflation fears, and tariff shocks, leaving markets on edge despite blockbuster results.

items.title: Bitget possibilita a abertura de investimentos passivos com aquisição automática e retorno anual de até 30%
items.author: Victoria, Seychelles
items.description: Bitget introduces a new Recurring Buy feature allowing users to automatically purchase cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum using Visa/Mastercard, implementing a Dollar Cost Averaging strategy with potential annual returns up to 30%.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned as a payment method for the new investment feature
Mentioned as a payment method for the new investment feature

items.title: Bitget, 자동 매수 기능 도입으로 연간 최대 30% 수익률 기대되는 패시브 투자 문 열어
items.author: Gracy Chen (Ceo Of Bitget)
items.description: Bitget introduces 'Recurring Buy' feature allowing users to automatically purchase cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum using Visa/Mastercard through a Dollar Cost Averaging strategy, enabling systematic and passive long-term investment.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned as a payment method for the new feature, with no direct impact on company performance
Mentioned as a payment method for the new feature, with no direct impact on company performance

items.title: Bitget 以自動購買功能啟動被動投資，年度回報率高達 30%
items.author: Gracy Chen
items.description: Bitget introduces a new recurring buy feature for cryptocurrencies, allowing users to automatically purchase Bitcoin and Ethereum via Visa/Mastercard using a Dollar Cost Averaging (DCA) strategy that potentially offers up to 30% returns.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned as a payment method for the new feature, with no direct impact on their business
Mentioned as a payment method for the new feature, with no direct impact on their business
